_readme: Merge this hooks block into your USER-level ~/.claude/settings.json (NOT the workspace .claude/settings.json -- workspace hooks don't fire for sessions opened in project subfolders). Replace C:\Users\you with your real profile path; settings.json does not expand ~. Hooks load at session start, so changes take effect in the NEXT session. Keep hook command strings free of $, <, >, and non-ASCII -- Claude Code's interpolating wrapper eats them silently (see harness_me.txt Section 4).

hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "try { if (Test-Path CHECKPOINT.md) { Write-Output '=== CHECKPOINT RECEIPT (resume context for this project) ==='; Write-Output ('CHECKPOINT.md present: ' + (Get-Item CHECKPOINT.md).Length + ' bytes / ' + @(Get-Content CHECKPOINT.md).Count + ' lines. NOT inlined here.'); Write-Output 'ACTION: Read CHECKPOINT.md to EOF before any non-pre-oriented action. If the Read shows a truncation / partial-view notice, re-Read with offset+limit until complete.'; Write-Output '=== end RECEIPT ===' } } catch { Write-Output '=== CHECKPOINT RECEIPT ERROR -- manually Read CHECKPOINT.md before acting ===' }"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path CHECKPOINT.md) { Write-Output 'REMINDER: Context is about to be compacted. If CHECKPOINT.md in the current project has not been updated this session, rewrite it now with compressed state before proceeding.' }"
